message:
The other day, I found myself in a bit of a pickle. I was about to head out for a weekend trip when I realized I hadn’t checked our go-bags in ages. In a moment of panic (okay, slight panic), I rifled through them and discovered we were low on water and snacks. A quick trip to the store later, we were all stocked up and ready to hit the road without a hitch. 

It was such a small win, but it felt like I’d just conquered a mountain! Sometimes, those little bits of preparedness make all the difference in our plans. 

Have you had a small win in your own family readiness lately? 

P.S. I came across this little refresher that helped me get organized!
